title: Kira
html:
Kira

Stub. Yahir's Ford Family Foundation mentor as of August 2021. First and currently only mention: 2021 08 03 kira ford mentor intro — "Hey Kira!, my name is Yahir Gonzalez. I got an email saying that you are my Ford mentor. I just wanted to introduce myself and say hello!!"

Sits in the same role-cluster as Jann (Renaissance) and Brenda — adult women who scaffold Yahir's Grants Pass → OSU pipeline. Densify if she recurs.
